/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcanbus_driver.so -o /home/pi/arm_ctrl_ws_trac_ik/devel/lib/libcanbus_driver.so CMakeFiles/canbus_driver.dir/src/canbus_driver.cpp.o   -L/home/pi/arm_ctrl_ws_trac_ik/src/arm_pkg/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/serial_ws/install/lib:/home/pi/arm_ctrl_ws_trac_ik/devel/lib:/home/pi/arm_ctrl_ws_trac_ik/src/arm_pkg/lib /home/pi/serial_ws/install/lib/libserial.so -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -lpthread -Wl,-Bdynamic /home/pi/arm_ctrl_ws_trac_ik/devel/lib/libtrac_ik.so -lboost_date_time -lnlopt -lkdl_parser -lorocos-kdl -lurdf -lurdfdom_sensor -lurdfdom_model_state -lurdfdom_model -lurdfdom_world -ltinyxml -ltinyxml2 -lroslib -lclass_loader -lament_index_cpp -lrcpputils -lrcutils -lrosconsole_bridge -lconsole_bridge -lroscpp -lboost_chrono -lboost_filesystem -lrosconsole -lrosconsole_log4cxx -lrosconsole_backend_interface -llog4cxx -lboost_regex -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lroscpp_serialization -lxmlrpcpp -lrostime -lcpp_common -lcontrolcan -lnlopt /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0
